The incredibly massive, deeply humiliating hostage crisis in southern India aggressively continued to paralyze the national security apparatus. On August 22, 1922, Michael Collins, the absolutely massive, incredibly brilliant, and fiercely iconic military intelligence director of the Irish Republican Army (IRA), was tragically and aggressively assassinated. During the highly devastating Irish Civil War, Collins was heavily ambushed and killed by anti-treaty IRA forces at Béal na Bláth in County Cork. His massive, profound death fiercely robbed the newly established Irish Free State of its most massive, capable founding architect, deeply traumatizing the incredibly fractured Irish nation.

On August 22, 1864, the absolutely massive, incredibly foundational, and historically monumental First Geneva Convention was officially and aggressively signed by twelve European nations. Deeply inspired by the massive humanitarian efforts of Henri Dunant, this incredible international treaty aggressively established the absolute, fundamental rules of international law regarding the massive, humane treatment of sick and wounded soldiers on the horrific battlefield. This massive agreement firmly laid the absolute bedrock for modern international humanitarian law and the Red Cross.
